runs.context_blueprint: {"language": "clojure", "build_system": "npm", "package_manager": "npm", "build_commands": ["npm ci", "npx shadow-cljs release client", "npx shadow-cljs release prerender"], "install_commands": ["apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends curl ca-certificates git build-essential openjdk-17-jdk", "curl -fsSL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/technomancy/leiningen/stable/bin/lein -o /usr/local/bin/lein", "chmod +x /usr/local/bin/lein"], "runtime_requirements": {"language_version": "Clojure 1.12.3; ClojureScript 1.11.132; Node 24", "system_packages": ["curl", "ca-certificates", "git", "build-essential", "openjdk-17-jdk"]}, "repo_type": "library", "base_image": "node:trixie", "base_image_rationale": "Provides a Debian-based Node environment compatible with the repo's package.json and allows installing Java/Leiningen to support the Clojure tooling.", "pitfalls": ["Node version in the base image may not exactly match 24; manual Node 24 installation may be required.", "Leiningen installation may fail in restricted networks; ensure lein script can be fetched during build."], "notes": "Shadow CLJS is used to build frontend assets. The release build outputs are placed under target/shadow-cljs-release/client/public/js. Expose port 8090 if running a dev server. This blueprint targets building the client and prerender artifacts as part of the image."}
runs.final_dockerfile:
FROM node:trixie

ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive

# Install system dependencies including Java and build tools
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
  curl ca-certificates git build-essential default-jdk \
  && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Install Leiningen for Clojure tooling (in case needed by some builds)
RUN curl -fsSL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/technomancy/leiningen/stable/bin/lein -o /usr/local/bin/lein \
  && chmod +x /usr/local/bin/lein

# Set working directory for the build
WORKDIR /app

# Copy package manifests first to utilize Docker cache for dependencies
COPY package.json package-lock.json* ./

# Install Node.js dependencies (including Shadow-CLJS)
RUN npm ci --silent

# Copy the rest of the repository
COPY . .

# Build the project from source: client assets and prerender output
RUN npx shadow-cljs release client
RUN npx shadow-cljs release prerender

# Expose port for a lightweight dev server if needed
EXPOSE 8090

# Start a simple static file server serving the built assets
# The release artifacts are expected under target/shadow-cljs-release/client/public/js
CMD ["npx","http-server","target/shadow-cljs-release/client/public","-p","8090"]

steps.tool_input:
{"path": "Dockerfile", "content": "FROM node:trixie

ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive

# Install system dependencies including Java and build tools
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
  curl ca-certificates git build-essential openjdk-17-jdk \
  && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Install Leiningen for Clojure tooling (in case needed by some builds)
RUN curl -fsSL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/technomancy/leiningen/stable/bin/lein -o /usr/local/bin/lein \
  && chmod +x /usr/local/bin/lein

# Set working directory for the build
WORKDIR /app

# Copy package manifests first to utilize Docker cache for dependencies
COPY package.json package-lock.json* ./

# Install Node.js dependencies (including Shadow-CLJS)
RUN npm ci --silent

# Copy the rest of the repository
COPY . .

# Build the project from source: client assets and prerender output
RUN npx shadow-cljs release client
RUN npx shadow-cljs release prerender

# Expose port for a lightweight dev server if needed
EXPOSE 8090

# Start a simple static file server serving the built assets
# The release artifacts are expected under target/shadow-cljs-release/client/public/js
CMD ["npx","http-server","target/shadow-cljs-release/client/public","-p","8090"]
"}

{"path": " .dockerignore", "content": "# Ignore VCS and npm and build artifacts to keep the build context small
.git
node_modules
target
site/public
prerender
"}

steps.tool_output: Image node:trixie java 17 NOT found on Docker Hub.

steps.tool_input: {"query": "OpenJDK 17 apt-get Debian bullseye missing openjdk-17-jdk apt get"}

{"path": "Dockerfile", "content": "FROM node:trixie

ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive

# Install system dependencies including Java and build tools
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
  curl ca-certificates git build-essential default-jdk \
  && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Install Leiningen for Clojure tooling (in case needed by some builds)
RUN curl -fsSL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/technomancy/leiningen/stable/bin/lein -o /usr/local/bin/lein \
  && chmod +x /usr/local/bin/lein

# Set working directory for the build
WORKDIR /app

# Copy package manifests first to utilize Docker cache for dependencies
COPY package.json package-lock.json* ./

# Install Node.js dependencies (including Shadow-CLJS)
RUN npm ci --silent

# Copy the rest of the repository
COPY . .

# Build the project from source: client assets and prerender output
RUN npx shadow-cljs release client
RUN npx shadow-cljs release prerender

# Expose port for a lightweight dev server if needed
EXPOSE 8090

# Start a simple static file server serving the built assets
# The release artifacts are expected under target/shadow-cljs-release/client/public/js
CMD ["npx","http-server","target/shadow-cljs-release/client/public","-p","8090"]
"}

verify_build_details.review_concerns: ["COPY package.json package-lock.json* ./: glob expansion depends on Docker; if no package-lock.json is available in the build context, this could fail in some environments.", "The build relies on network access to fetch dependencies and Shadow-CLJS tools; in restricted environments the npm/npx steps may fail."]

artifacts.content:
FROM node:trixie

ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive

# Install system dependencies including Java and build tools
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
  curl ca-certificates git build-essential default-jdk \
  && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Install Leiningen for Clojure tooling (in case needed by some builds)
RUN curl -fsSL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/technomancy/leiningen/stable/bin/lein -o /usr/local/bin/lein \
  && chmod +x /usr/local/bin/lein

# Set working directory for the build
WORKDIR /app

# Copy package manifests first to utilize Docker cache for dependencies
COPY package.json package-lock.json* ./

# Install Node.js dependencies (including Shadow-CLJS)
RUN npm ci --silent

# Copy the rest of the repository
COPY . .

# Build the project from source: client assets and prerender output
RUN npx shadow-cljs release client
RUN npx shadow-cljs release prerender

# Expose port for a lightweight dev server if needed
EXPOSE 8090

# Start a simple static file server serving the built assets
# The release artifacts are expected under target/shadow-cljs-release/client/public/js
CMD ["npx","http-server","target/shadow-cljs-release/client/public","-p","8090"]
